name: Pasta Bolognese
recipe: Heat olive oil over medium-high. Sauté onion 5 min, add garlic 1 min.
Brown beef, drain fat. Add pasta sauce and seasoning, simmer 20 min.
Cook spaghetti in salted water until al dente.
Toss pasta with sauce. Finish with Parmesan.

name: Chicken Alfredo
recipe: Cook fettuccine al dente. Reserve 1 cup pasta water.
Season and sear chicken in butter 4–5 min per side. Rest and slice.
Melt butter, add garlic, pour in cream. Whisk in Parmesan until smooth.
Toss pasta in sauce with chicken. Adjust with pasta water.

name: Pasta & Italian Sausage
recipe: Brown sausage, remove and slice.
Sauté zucchini, garlic, chili flakes. Add olives and tomatoes, simmer 15 min.
Return sausage. Toss with cooked pasta. Finish with Parmesan.

name: Tortellini Bolognese
recipe: Brown beef with onion and garlic. Add pasta sauce, simmer 15 min.
Cook tortellini per package. Combine and finish with Parmesan.

name: Tortellini a la Jared
recipe: Cook tortellini in salted water. Reserve ¼ cup pasta water.
Melt butter with garlic 1–2 min. Toss tortellini in garlic butter.
Finish generously with Parmesan.

name: Pasta & Burrata
recipe: Roast cherry tomatoes with olive oil, salt, pepper at 400°F 20 min.
Cook pasta, toss with roasted tomatoes, butter and basil.
Top each bowl with burrata. Break at table.

name: Pizza Lasagna & Cheese Pizza
recipe: Cook lasagna noodles al dente. Mix ricotta with Parmesan and seasoning.
Layer: sauce, noodles, ricotta, mozzarella, pepperoni. Repeat twice.
Bake 375°F 35 min covered, 10 min uncovered. Rest 10 min.
Prepare pizza kit alongside per instructions.

name: Baked Ziti with Italian Sausage
recipe: Cook ziti al dente. Brown sausage, add pasta sauce, simmer 10 min.
Mix pasta with sauce, ricotta, half the mozzarella. Pour into 9x13 dish.
Top with remaining mozzarella and Parmesan. Bake 375°F 25–30 min.

name: Gnocchi Brown Butter & Parmesan
recipe: Cook gnocchi in salted water until they float, 2–3 min. Drain.
Cook butter over medium heat, swirling, until golden brown and nutty, 4–5 min.
Add sage and garlic 30 sec. Toss gnocchi. Serve with Parmesan.

name: Creamy Tuscan Chicken Pasta
recipe: Sear chicken in olive oil, slice. Sauté garlic in same pan.
Add sun-dried tomatoes, then cream and broth. Stir in Parmesan.
Return chicken. Toss with cooked pasta.

name: Penne Arrabiata with Sausage
recipe: Brown sausage, remove. Fry garlic and chili flakes in oil.
Add tomatoes, simmer 15 min. Return sausage 5 min.
Toss with penne. Finish with basil and Parmesan.

name: Chicken & Rice with Veg
recipe: Season chicken thighs, sear skin-down 4–5 min until golden. Flip 3 min. Remove.
Sauté garlic in drippings. Add rice, stir to coat. Pour in broth.
Nestle chicken on top. Bring to boil, cover, cook 18–20 min on low.
Steam veg separately. Serve on side.

name: Butter Chicken & Coconut Rice
recipe: Marinate chicken in yogurt, garlic, ginger, garam masala 30+ min.
Sauté onion in butter. Add chicken, brown all sides.
Add butter chicken sauce, tomatoes, simmer covered 25 min. Stir in cream last 5 min.
Cook basmati in half coconut milk, half water.

name: Lemon Chicken Rice Noodles
recipe: Soak rice noodles per package. Slice chicken thin, season, cook in butter 3–4 min per side.
Sauté garlic. Add veg 3–4 min. Add noodles, soy, lemon juice, sesame oil.
Return chicken, toss to combine.

name: Chicken Stir-Fry & Rice
recipe: Cook rice. Toss sliced chicken in cornstarch, season.
Heat sesame oil in wok until smoking. Stir-fry chicken 3–4 min. Remove.
Add garlic, ginger, veg 3–4 min. Return chicken, add soy sauce. Serve over rice.

name: Chicken Fajitas
recipe: Toss sliced chicken in fajita seasoning and olive oil.
Cook in hot cast iron 3–4 min per side until charred. Rest and slice.
Cook peppers and onion in same pan over high heat 5–6 min.
Serve family style with warm tortillas and all toppings.

name: Mediterranean Chicken & Rice
recipe: Marinate chicken in yogurt, lemon, oregano, garlic 30+ min. Roast 400°F 25 min.
Cook rice in salted broth.
Arrange sliced chicken over rice with tomatoes, olives, cucumber. Crumble feta over top.
Serve with tzatziki and warm pita.

name: Wings & Fries
recipe: Pat wings dry. Toss with baking powder, salt, garlic powder.
Bake 250°F 30 min, then 425°F 45 min flipping halfway.
Melt butter with hot sauce. Toss wings. Bake fries per package.

name: Power Bowls & Poutine
recipe: Season and roast chicken at 400°F 25 min. Slice.
Roast veg with oil and seasoning.
Bake fries very crispy. Make gravy — keep hot.
For poutine: hot fries + cheese curds + hot gravy immediately. Build power bowls with rice and chicken.

name: Chicken Shawarma with Rice
recipe: Marinate chicken in yogurt, shawarma spice, lemon, olive oil overnight.
Grill or broil 6–7 min per side until charred. Rest, slice thin.
Cook basmati in salted water. Warm pita.
Serve chicken over rice with pita, garlic sauce and pickles.

name: Honey Garlic Chicken with Rice
recipe: Season chicken, sear in butter 3 min per side. Mix honey, soy, garlic, broth.
Pour sauce over chicken, simmer covered 20 min.
Remove chicken, thicken sauce with cornstarch slurry. Coat chicken in sauce.
Serve over rice with sesame seeds.

name: Chicken Pot Pie
recipe: Cook and dice chicken. Sauté onion and garlic 5 min in butter.
Add flour 2 min. Gradually whisk in broth then milk until thick.
Add chicken, veg, thyme. Pour into pie dish, top with crust. Bake 400°F 30–35 min.

name: Chicken Schnitzel with Potato
recipe: Roast potato wedges at 400°F 35–40 min.
Pound chicken flat. Dredge: flour → egg → breadcrumbs.
Pan fry in butter and oil 3–4 min per side until deep golden.
Serve with potato wedges and lemon.

name: Teriyaki Chicken with Rice
recipe: Mix soy, honey, mirin, garlic, ginger. Marinate chicken 30 min.
Cook chicken in butter 5–6 min per side. Add sauce and reduce until glazed.
Serve over rice with sesame seeds and veg on side.

name: Pork Loin with Potato & Veg
recipe: Rub pork with Dijon, garlic, rosemary, thyme, salt, pepper.
Sear all sides in olive oil 2 min each.
Roast at 375°F with potatoes, butter knobs on top, until 145°F internal.
Rest 10 min before slicing.

name: Pork Kabobs with Rice & Salad
recipe: Cube pork, marinate in oil, lemon and spices 1+ hour.
Thread pork, peppers and onion onto skewers.
Grill over medium-high, turning every 3–4 min, 12–15 min total.
Serve over rice with salad on the side.

name: Pork Tacos & Salad
recipe: Rub pork with taco seasoning. Sear all sides, roast 400°F until 145°F internal.
Rest 5 min and slice thin.
Warm tortillas. Build tacos with pork, cheese, sour cream, salsa. Squeeze lime.

name: Pulled Pork Sliders
recipe: Mix dry rub: brown sugar, garlic powder, onion powder, paprika, salt, pepper. Coat pork.
Sear all sides. Slow cook low 8–10 hrs with vinegar until pull-apart tender.
Shred, toss with BBQ sauce. Serve on toasted slider buns with coleslaw.

name: Pork Chops with Apple & Potato
recipe: Season pork chops, sear in butter 3–4 min per side. Remove.
Roast potato wedges at 400°F 30 min.
Sauté garlic, add sliced apples with brown sugar 3 min. Add Dijon and broth, simmer 3 min.
Return pork to pan, coat in sauce and cook through.

name: Sweet & Sour Pork with Rice
recipe: Cube pork, coat in egg then cornstarch. Deep fry at 375°F until crispy.
Make sauce: ketchup, soy, vinegar, brown sugar, pineapple juice. Simmer 3 min.
Stir-fry peppers, onion, garlic. Add sauce and pineapple. Thicken. Add pork.

name: Burgers & Fries
recipe: Form patties ¾ inch thick, press dimple in center. Season generously.
Cook over high heat 3–4 min per side. Add cheese last minute.
Toast buns in butter. Bake fries. Build burgers with toppings.

name: Smash Burgers & Fries
recipe: Divide beef into loose 2oz balls — don't compress.
Heat cast iron until smoking. Add ball, immediately smash flat. Season.
Cook 1.5–2 min until edges dark. Flip, add cheese. Toast buns in butter.

name: Beef Roast with Veg & Potato
recipe: Dust roast in seasoned flour. Sear all sides deeply, 3 min per side.
Roast at 325°F with veg and broth until 135°F internal.
Rest 15 min, slice against grain. Use pan juices as jus.

name: DIY Donair / Beef Wrap
recipe: Mix beef with garlic powder, oregano, cayenne, salt. Form into tight loaf. Bake 350°F 30–35 min.
Cool slightly, slice very thin. Crisp slices briefly in pan.
Warm pitas. Build wraps with beef, veg, cheese, donair sauce.

name: Tacos
recipe: Brown beef, drain fat. Add taco seasoning and ½ cup water, simmer 3–5 min.
Warm taco shells. Dice tomato, shred lettuce.
Build tacos with beef and toppings. Squeeze lime.

name: Taco & Fajitas
recipe: Brown beef with taco seasoning. Cook peppers and onion in oil over high heat until charred.
Warm tortillas. Serve family style with all toppings.

name: Slow Cooker Stew & Bread
recipe: Dust beef in flour, brown in batches in butter.
Add all to slow cooker with veg, broth, tomato paste, Worcestershire and thyme.
Cook low 8 hrs. Serve with crusty bread.

name: Korean Beef Bowl with Rice
recipe: Cook rice. Brown beef in sesame oil, drain most fat.
Add garlic, ginger 1 min. Add soy sauce, brown sugar, chili flakes. Simmer until glossy.
Serve over rice. Top with green onion and sesame seeds.

name: Beef Stroganoff with Egg Noodles
recipe: Slice beef thin, season, sear in butter in batches. Remove.
Cook onion, mushrooms 6–8 min until golden. Add garlic, flour, then broth, Worcestershire, Dijon.
Return beef, simmer 5 min. Remove from heat, stir in sour cream. Serve over egg noodles.

name: Meatballs & Marinara
recipe: Soak breadcrumbs in milk. Mix with beef, pork, egg, Parmesan, grated onion, garlic, seasoning.
Form golf-ball meatballs. Brown in batches.
Simmer in pasta sauce 20–25 min. Serve over spaghetti.

name: Cottage Pie
recipe: Brown beef, add onion, carrots, garlic. Add flour, tomato paste, Worcestershire, broth, thyme. Simmer 15 min.
Make creamy mashed potato with butter and milk.
Pour filling in dish, spread mashed potato over top. Fork surface. Bake 400°F 20–25 min until golden.

name: Salmon with Garlic Bread
recipe: Season salmon with dill, salt, pepper. Bake 400°F 12–15 min until it flakes.
Mix softened butter with garlic, salt. Spread on halved baguette.
Broil garlic bread 2–3 min until golden. Serve salmon with lemon wedges.

name: Salmon Broccolini & Garlic Bread
recipe: Roast broccolini with oil and garlic at 400°F 15 min.
Brush salmon with soy sauce, honey, lemon. Bake 400°F 12–14 min.
Broil garlic bread until golden. Serve together.

name: Teriyaki Salmon with Rice
recipe: Mix teriyaki sauce. Marinate salmon 20–30 min.
Sear salmon in butter, baste with sauce, cook 3–4 min per side.
Serve over rice with sesame seeds and veg on side.

name: Fish Tacos with Lime Crema
recipe: Season fish with cumin, paprika, garlic powder. Pan fry in oil 3–4 min per side.
Make lime crema: sour cream + lime juice + salt.
Warm tortillas. Build tacos: fish, coleslaw, lime crema.

name: Fish & Chips
recipe: Cut potatoes into chips. Parboil 5 min, drain and dry. Fry at 325°F 5 min, then 375°F 4 min.
Dip fish in seasoned flour, then egg batter. Fry at 375°F 4–5 min.
Season immediately with salt. Serve with tartar sauce and malt vinegar.

name: Grilled Cheese & Soup
recipe: Heat soup. Add splash of milk if cream-based.
Butter one side of each bread slice. Layer cheese inside.
Cook medium-low 3–4 min until golden. Flip, cook 3 more min. Cut diagonally.

name: DIY Pizza
recipe: Prepare dough per kit instructions. Preheat oven to 425°F.
Stretch dough, brush crust with olive oil. Spread sauce thinly.
Add mozzarella, pepperoni, toppings. Bake 12–15 min until golden.

name: Fancy Ramen
recipe: Soft boil eggs exactly 6.5 min. Transfer to ice water. Peel and halve.
Simmer broth with miso, soy, garlic, ginger. Add butter and sesame oil.
Cook noodles separately. Build bowls: noodles, broth, egg, green onion, nori, chili oil.

name: Mac & Cheese
recipe: Cook macaroni al dente. Make béchamel: melt butter, add flour, whisk in milk until thick.
Stir in cheddar, mustard powder, garlic powder. Combine with pasta.
Pour into dish, top with breadcrumbs. Bake 375°F 25 min until golden.

name: Steak Frite
recipe: Rest steak 30–45 min. Pat dry, season aggressively.
Heat cast iron until smoking. Sear 3–4 min. Flip. Add butter, garlic, herbs. Baste continuously 3 more min.
Rest minimum 5 min. Double-fry frites. Season with flaky salt immediately.

name: BBQ
recipe: Remove meat from fridge 30 min before. Season with dry rub.
Grill over medium-high, turning as needed.
Baste with BBQ sauce final 5 min only. Rest before serving.

name: Bacon Hash
recipe: Parboil diced potatoes 5–6 min. Drain and dry.
Cook bacon crisp. Reserve fat. Cook potatoes in fat over high heat — don't stir, let crust form.
Add peppers, onion, garlic. Make wells, crack eggs in. Cover until whites set.

name: Pancakes & Bacon
recipe: Mix dry: flour, baking powder, sugar. Mix wet: egg, milk, butter, vanilla. Combine — lumps are fine.
Rest batter 5 min. Cook bacon crisp in separate pan.
Cook ¼ cup batter per pancake on medium heat 2–3 min, flip, 1–2 more min.

name: McMuffins
recipe: Cook bacon crisp or sausage into patties.
Fry egg in buttered ring mold — season with salt and pepper.
Toast and butter English muffin. Layer: muffin, egg, cheese, meat. Rest 1 min to melt.

name: French Onion Soup
recipe: Caramelize sliced onions in butter and oil over medium-low 45–60 min. Add sugar to help.
Add wine 2 min, then broth, thyme, bay. Simmer 20 min.
Ladle into oven-safe bowls, top with baguette and Gruyère. Broil until bubbling and golden.

name: Shakshuka with Crusty Bread
recipe: Cook onion and peppers 8 min. Add garlic and spices 2 min.
Add crushed tomatoes, simmer 10 min. Make wells, crack eggs in. Season eggs.
Cover and cook on low until whites set, yolks runny. Top with feta.

name: Baked Potato Bar
recipe: Scrub potatoes, prick all over, rub with oil and coat in salt.
Bake directly on oven rack at 400°F 55–65 min.
Cook bacon crisp, crumble. Set out all toppings. Everyone builds their own.

name: Quesadillas
recipe: Prepare filling (cooked chicken, seasoned beef, or plain cheese).
Fill half a tortilla with cheese and filling. Fold.
Cook in buttered pan 3 min until golden. Flip 2–3 more min. Cheese should be fully melted.

name: Chicken Noodle Soup
recipe: Simmer chicken with onion, garlic, carrots, celery, thyme and bay leaf in broth 25–30 min.
Remove chicken, shred. Return to pot. Add egg noodles and cook 8–10 min.
Season with salt, pepper and fresh parsley.

name: Tomato Bisque with Grilled Cheese
recipe: Roast canned tomatoes, onion and garlic at 400°F 25 min. Blend smooth with broth and basil.
Simmer in pot 10 min. Stir in cream and butter. Season.
Make classic grilled cheese. Serve soup with grilled cheese for dipping.

name: French Toast
recipe: Whisk eggs, milk, vanilla, cinnamon and sugar together.
Dip bread slices 20–30 sec per side. Cook in buttered pan medium heat 3–4 min per side until deep golden.
Dust with icing sugar. Protein swap: bacon crisp OR sausage patties — choose per night.

name: Omelette Bar
recipe: Cook bacon crisp OR sausage through. Set aside with veg fillings.
Per omelette: whisk 2–3 eggs, season. Heat butter in non-stick pan over medium-high.
Pour eggs, stir gently while shaking pan. When almost set, add fillings to one half. Fold and slide onto plate.
Each person builds their own.

name: Crepes
recipe: Blend flour, eggs, milk, melted butter, sugar, vanilla, salt until smooth. Rest 30 min.
Cook in lightly buttered pan: pour ¼ cup batter, swirl thin, cook 60–90 sec until edges lift. Flip, 30 sec more.
Serve with maple syrup, jam and icing sugar. Protein swap: bacon OR sausage alongside.

name: Crockpot Bolognese
recipe: Brown beef with onion and garlic. Add tomato paste 2 min.
Transfer to crockpot with pasta sauce, seasoning and milk. Cook low 6–8 hrs.
Cook spaghetti fresh to serve. Top with Parmesan.

name: Crockpot Butter Chicken & Rice
recipe: Place chicken, sauce, tomatoes, onion, garlic, ginger and spices in crockpot. Cook low 6 hrs.
Stir in cream and butter in last 30 min.
Cook basmati in half coconut milk, half water. Serve with naan.

name: Crockpot Pulled Pork Sliders
recipe: Rub pork with dry spice mix. Sear all sides.
Cook low 8–10 hrs with vinegar and broth. Shred, toss with BBQ sauce.
Serve on toasted slider buns with coleslaw and pickles.

name: Crockpot Honey Garlic Chicken
recipe: Season chicken. Whisk honey, soy, garlic, ginger, broth. Pour over chicken in crockpot.
Cook low 4–6 hrs. Remove chicken, thicken sauce with cornstarch slurry on high 15 min.
Return chicken. Serve over rice with sesame seeds.

name: Crockpot Beef Stroganoff
recipe: Season beef in flour. Place in crockpot with mushrooms, onion, garlic, broth, Worcestershire and Dijon.
Cook low 7–8 hrs. Thicken with cornstarch slurry in last 30 min.
Remove from heat, stir in sour cream. Serve over egg noodles.

name: Crockpot Meatballs & Marinara
recipe: Mix meatballs from beef, pork, egg, breadcrumbs, Parmesan, garlic, seasoning. Brown lightly.
Place in crockpot covered with pasta sauce. Cook low 6 hrs.
Cook spaghetti fresh. Serve with garlic bread.

name: Crockpot Cottage Pie
recipe: Brown beef with onion, garlic, carrots. Add flour, tomato paste, Worcestershire, broth, thyme.
Place in crockpot, cook low 6 hrs.
Spread with fresh mashed potato, bake 400°F 20–25 min until golden.

name: Crockpot Chili with Cornbread
recipe: Brown beef, drain. Add all to crockpot with tomatoes, broth and spices.
Cook low 6–8 hrs. Add kidney beans in last hour.
Make cornbread per package. Top chili with sour cream and shredded cheese.

name: Crockpot French Onion Chicken
recipe: Caramelize onions in butter 45 min. Season chicken.
Place chicken in crockpot with onions, wine, broth, garlic, thyme. Cook low 6 hrs.
Thicken sauce in last 30 min. Top chicken with Gruyère, broil until melted.

name: Crockpot Mac & Cheese
recipe: Place uncooked macaroni, milk, evaporated milk, butter, cream cheese and seasonings in crockpot.
Cook low 2–3 hrs, stirring every 45 min.
Stir in shredded cheddar in last 30 min until melted and creamy.

name: Crockpot BBQ Beef Brisket
recipe: Rub brisket with brown sugar, paprika, mustard, salt, pepper. Sear all sides.
Cook in crockpot with broth, garlic and onion low 8–10 hrs.
Slice against grain or shred. Toss in BBQ sauce. Serve on buns with coleslaw.

name: Crockpot Potato Soup
recipe: Dice potatoes and onion. Place in crockpot with broth and garlic.
Cook low 6–8 hrs. Mash some potato to thicken.
Stir in butter, milk, sour cream. Top with bacon, cheese and green onion.

name: Crockpot Chicken & Rice
recipe: Place chicken, broth, onion, garlic and seasonings in crockpot. Cook low 5–6 hrs.
Remove chicken. Stir in rinsed rice. Return chicken on top.
Cook high 30–45 min until rice is done. Fluff and serve.

name: Camping – Burgers & Dogs
recipe: Get fire or camp grill hot.
Grill patties 4 min per side, add cheese last minute. Grill hot dogs turning until charred.
Toast buns. Serve with chips and condiments.

name: Camping – Soup & Fire Pies
recipe: Heat soup on camp stove.
Butter bread outside, layer cheese and meat inside. Lock in pie iron.
Cook over coals 3 min per side until golden.

name: Camping – Bacon Egg Brunch Hash
recipe: Par-cook diced potatoes in foil over coals 15–20 min.
Cook bacon crisp in cast iron. Add potatoes to fat — let get crispy.
Add peppers and onion 4–5 min. Make wells, scramble eggs in.

name: Camping – Pancakes & Bacon
recipe: Mix pancake batter per package.
Cook on buttered camp griddle over camp stove, 2 min per side.
Fry bacon in separate pan. Serve stacked with maple syrup.
